title: Oscars 2026 Winners: The Full List - Best Original Screenplay
text: Ryan Coogler won the Academy Award for Best Original Screenplay at the 98th Oscars for his film "Sinners" (Warner Bros.). According to the article, Coogler's screenplay victory was one of four Oscars that "Sinners" secured during the ceremony held on March 15, 2026. The publication notes that this film "took home four Oscars" in total, making it one of the night's most successful productions alongside the big winner, "One Battle After Another". The other nominees in this category included Robert Kaplow for "Blue Moon", Jafar Panahi and collaborators for "It Was Just an Accident", and Josh Safdie and Ronald Bronstein for "Marty Supreme".
